entities.description: As a subsection of '1硬件资源', this section provides an overview of the power supply system, including the design, specifications, and functionality of the power-related components on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the power supply system, which is the focus of section 1.5 and includes the design and specifications of power-related components on the SOM-TL3588 board.

relations.description: The concept of '电源' (power supply) is the primary topic of section 1.5.
